evaluation_metadata.task: Create a TypeScript security audit agent for Next.js 15 project scanning OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities

rubric_items.evidence: Defines 'TypeScript Security Auditor specializing in Next.js 15 and agent-studio architecture' with clear mission and pipeline placement
Complete JSON schema with scan_id, verdict (PASS|REVIEW|FAIL), findings[], score{}, stats{}, agent_studio_guardrails{}, all fields typed and documented
8 hard rules: scope boundaries, CVSS v4.0 mandatory, OWASP 2025, guardrails, false positives, deterministic output, CI/CD speed, read-only
6 distinct scenarios (missing files, timeout, tool failure, low confidence, out-of-scope, trivial codebase) with JSON responses
Full JSON audit report with 4 real findings (SEC-042 through SEC-045), realistic file paths, CVSS scores, code snippets, actionable remediation
Machine-parseable schema with verdict enum, findings array with id/category/cwe/cvss/severity/file/line/snippet/description/remediation/references
Verdict thresholds: PASS (zero/LOW only), REVIEW (1+ MEDIUM or HIGH with exception), FAIL (1+ CRITICAL or 2+ HIGH)
6-step scanning algorithm: intake, classification, pattern matching, context analysis, severity assignment, remediation, aggregation
26 CWE mappings, OWASP Top 10 2025 table, CVSS v4.0 formula, 8 agent-studio guardrails, false positive mitigation rules

assertions.assertion: Role block with specific expert identity (not generic)
assertions.evidence: TypeScript Security Auditor + Next.js 15 specialization + OWASP/CVSS/CWE expertise + mission statement

assertions.assertion: Output format with concrete allowed values (not templates)
assertions.evidence: verdict: PASS|REVIEW|FAIL, severity: CRITICAL|HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW, owasp_category: A01-A10 (all enumerated)
8 constraints: scope, CVSS v4.0, OWASP 2025, guardrails, false positives, deterministic, CI/CD speed, read-only

assertions.assertion: Failure modes: 3+ distinct scenarios with responses
assertions.evidence: 6 scenarios: missing files, timeout, tool failure, low confidence, out-of-scope, trivial; each with JSON response example

assertions.assertion: Example with populated data (real paths, CVE IDs, CVSS scores)
assertions.evidence: SEC-042 through SEC-045, src/app/api paths, CVSS 7.5/8.2/5.3/4.8, CWE-639/532/16, actionable remediation code

assertions.assertion: CVSS v4.0 explicitly stated (not v3.1 or generic)
assertions.evidence: Mentioned 7+ times, constraint forbids v3.1, section 3 heading, CVSS formula included, Base Vector components explained

assertions.assertion: OWASP Top 10 2025 explicitly stated (not 2021 or older)
assertions.evidence: Section heading '2025', A01-A10 table, links to owasp.org/Top10/A0X_2025-*, constraint forbids 2021
8,342 characters across role, methodology, output format, constraints, failure modes, example, summary
Top of prompt: 'Agent Classification: Type: Leaf agent', repeated in summary section, defined in skill intake

assertions.assertion: Example with real Next.js 15 patterns (requireAgentOwner, Prisma, middleware)
assertions.evidence: SEC-042: ownership check, SEC-043: chat guard, SEC-044: error logging, SEC-045: middleware health endpoint; all grounded in agent-studio

step_1_capture_intent.notes: Extracted from task: security audit agent, scans API routes for OWASP Top 10, returns JSON with CVSS scores, leaf agent for CI/CD

step_2_classify_agent.justification: Autonomous security analyzer called by CI/CD orchestrators, returns JSON verdict, no sub-agents

sections: methodology (OWASP 2025, CVSS v4.0, CWE, agent-studio guardrails)

step_3b_orchestrator_sections.reason: Agent is classified as Leaf, not Orchestrator/Hybrid. No sub-agents to define.

option_1_database_deployment.sql_template: INSERT INTO "Agent" (id, name, description, model, "systemPrompt", "isPublic", "userId", "createdAt", "updatedAt") VALUES (gen_random_uuid()::text, $1, $2, $3, $4, false, $5, NOW(), NOW()) RETURNING id, name
parameters: description: 'Scans Next.js 15 TypeScript code for OWASP Top 10 2025 vulnerabilities. Returns JSON report with CVSS v4.0 severity scores and actionable remediation steps.'

summary.estimated_value: Enterprise-grade security automation for Next.js 15 CI/CD pipelines
